metadata.task: Determine which rod requires more torque to achieve the same angular acceleration.
metadata.description: Work from the Torque and Rotational Inertia scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: LLM applies torque to both rods and compares angular accelerations.
reasoning: Moment of inertia is larger when rotating about the end than about the center, so rod 2 needs more torque.
